name: QNI : Access to Improperly Secured Service - Kerberos Deprecated or Unknown Cipher Suite in use
notes: This rule triggers when a deprecated or unknown cipher suite is being used for Kerberos communications.
conditions_text: when any of Suspect Content Descriptions match deprecated or unknown cipher suite
TD_list: APPLY QNI : Access to Improperly Secured Service - Kerberos Deprecated or Unknown Cipher Suite in use on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when any of Suspect Content Descriptions match deprecated or unknown cipher suite
RED_list: Event name: QNI : Access to Improperly Secured Service - Kerberos Deprecated or Unknown Cipher Suite in use
Event description: Detects when a deprecated or unknown cipher suite is being used for Kerberos communications.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
